content: div id  attachment_584438  style  width  310px  class  wp-caption alignleft   img decoding  async  aria-describedby  caption-attachment-584438  src    alt  The da Vinci 5 system.  width  300  height  195  class  size-medium wp-image-584438  srcset    300w,   150w,   366w,   768w  sizes   max-width  300px  100vw, 300px     p id  caption-attachment-584438  class  wp-caption-text  The da Vinci 5 system.   Credit  Intuitive Surgical  p   div   p Intuitive announced today that it completed its acquisition of the da Vinci and Ion distribution business operated out of Europe.  p   p The Sunnyvale, California-based surgical robotics leader acquired the distribution business operated by Ab Medica, Abex, Excelencia Rob tica and affiliates. It marks the formal expansion of Intuitive s direct operations in Europe.  p   p  a href    said the acquisition enables it to support customers in a more agile and integrated way. It brings minimally invasive care to more patients across Italy, Spain, Portugal, Malta, San Marino and associated territories.  p   p Following the deal, Intuitive now wholly owns the da Vinci and Ion business of Ab Medica, Abex and Excelencia Rob tica. It has integrated business operations into its European commercial and marketing organization. SVP and GM Dirk Barten leads that unit.  p   p  Today marks an important step in our commitment to expanding access to proven, safe and effective minimally invasive care to more patients across Europe,  said Intuitive CEO Dave Rosa.  Our direct presence means we are better positioned to meet the needs of our customers in these geographies as we drive forward our shared goals of improving patient outcomes, improving patient and care team experience, increasing access to minimally invasive care, and lowering the total cost of care.   p   hr     div style  text-align  center    a href     img loading  lazy  decoding  async  class  aligncenter size-full wp-image-568305  src    alt  SITE AD for the 2026 Robotics Summit save the date.  width  728  height  90      a   div   hr     p Intuitive said there is more than 470  a href    Vinci surgical robots  a  installed in Italy, Spain and Portugal as of Dec. 31, 2025. da Vinci is the leader among surgical robotic platforms, and even expanded its indications in the U.S. earlier this year, expanding to cardiac procedures. Ion, meanwhile is a robotic-assisted, catheter-based platform for minimally invasive lung biopsy. Intuitive recently launched the Ion endoluminal system in Italy and Spain as well.  p   p  Intuitive is entering a new chapter, building on more than two decades of introducing and scaling access to our technology across Southern Europe,  Barten said.  We are excited to welcome approximately 250 employees to the Intuitive team as we commence our direct operations, and together continue driving innovation in service of patients, care teams, and healthcare professionals.   p   p The post  a href    buys European surgical robot distributors  a  appeared first on  a href    Robot Report  a .  p
